project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Ran MFC survey overnight and Tim confirmed that the RCT cut had been unsuccessful. Back at surface at 08:00hrs KT and currently bleeding down and waiting to flush the lubricator and tool with diesel prior to rigging down the MFC string. TCO arranged a meeting to discuss the report and the next operation is likely to be the Welltec cutter.

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Just about to pick up the lubricator and tools. String check witnessed by DSS.
